manual.title: Manual hub setup
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Sofabaton hub. The integration learns its name and model after connecting.

ports.title: Integration ports
ports.description: These ports are shared by all Sofabaton hubs configured in Home Assistant. Most users can keep the defaults.

data_description.hub_listen_base: TCP port used by physical hubs to connect to the integration.
data_description.proxy_udp_port: UDP port used for official app discovery and connections. Keep port 8102 for iOS compatibility unless another service already uses it.
data_description.roku_listen_port: HTTP port used to receive Wi-Fi device button presses. Changing it breaks X1 compatibility and requires existing Wi-Fi devices and commands to be synchronized again.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered Sofabaton hub
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant found the Sofabaton hub **{name}** at **{host}**. Submit to configure it.

abort.already_configured: This Sofabaton hub is already configured.
abort.not_x1_hub: The discovered device is not a supported Sofabaton hub.
abort.x2_disabled: Sofabaton X2 discovery is disabled in `configuration.yaml`. To enable it, remove `enable_x2_discovery: false` from the `sofabaton_x1s:` section (or set it to `true`) and restart Home Assistant.

ports.title: Integration ports
ports.description: These ports are shared by all Sofabaton hubs configured in Home Assistant. Most users can keep the defaults.

data_description.hub_listen_base: TCP port used by physical hubs to connect to the integration.
data_description.proxy_udp_port: UDP port used for official app discovery and connections. Keep port 8102 for iOS compatibility unless another service already uses it.
data_description.roku_listen_port: HTTP port used to receive Wi-Fi device button presses. Changing it breaks X1 compatibility and requires existing Wi-Fi devices and commands to be synchronized again.

fetch_device_commands.name: Fetch commands for device or activity
fetch_device_commands.description: Fetches and caches commands for an activity or device so they appear on the diagnostic sensor.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub from which to fetch commands.

ent_id.name: Activity or device ID
ent_id.description: ID of the activity or device on the hub.

play_ir_blob.name: Play IR blob
play_ir_blob.description: Streams a command blob to the hub for one-time playback without saving it. Accepts a canonical blob body without its final replay-tail checksum byte or a descriptive protocol string such as `P:Sony12 R:40000 D:1 F:18 MUL:2`.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub on which to play the command.

blob.name: Blob or descriptor
blob.description: Canonical blob body as hexadecimal without its final replay-tail checksum byte, or a descriptive protocol string beginning with `P:`. Whitespace and newlines are ignored in hexadecimal input.

persist_ir_blob.name: Save IR blob
persist_ir_blob.description: Adds a command to an existing IR device by staging the current command IDs, uploading a canonical command blob, and saving it on the hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub on which to save the command.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: ID of the existing IR device that will receive the command.

command_name.name: Command name
command_name.description: Label to save on the hub for the new command.

blob.name: Blob or descriptor
blob.description: Canonical blob body as hexadecimal without its final replay-tail checksum byte, or a descriptive protocol string beginning with `P:`. Whitespace and newlines are ignored in hexadecimal input.

fetch_blob.name: Fetch normalized blob
fetch_blob.description: Requests `0x020C [device_id, command_id]` and returns normalized command blob records, including the canonical body, removed checksum byte, and a parsed descriptor when available.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub from which to fetch the blob.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Hub device ID to request with `0x020C`.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: Optional command ID to request. Omit it to request all records with `ff`.

backup_bundle.name: Back up hub bundle
backup_bundle.description: Returns a `hub_bundle` JSON payload. Omit device IDs to back up all devices and activities, or provide device IDs to back up only those devices.

device_ids.name: Device IDs
device_ids.description: Optional list of device IDs from 1 through 255. Omit it or provide an empty list to back up the whole hub.

restore_backup.name: Restore hub bundle
restore_backup.description: Restores a `hub_bundle` JSON payload. Devices are restored first, followed by activities using the automatically generated device ID mapping.

backup.name: Backup payload
backup.description: Complete `hub_bundle` object returned by the back up hub bundle action.

dump_ir_commands.name: Dump raw IR commands
dump_ir_commands.description: Requests `0x020C [device_id, command_id]` and returns parsed raw command blob pages for a device.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub from which to dump commands.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Hub device ID to request with `0x020C`.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: Optional command ID to request. Omit it to request all records with `ff`.

create_wifi_device.name: Create Wi-Fi device
create_wifi_device.description: Creates a Wi-Fi device on the selected hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub on which to create the device.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Name to assign to the Wi-Fi device on the hub.

commands.name: Custom commands
commands.description: List of 1 through 10 command names to map to the emulated app slots. X1S and X2 hubs support Unicode characters and punctuation.

power_on_command_id.name: Power-on command ID
power_on_command_id.description: Optional position in `commands` to use for power on, where 1 is the first command.

power_off_command_id.name: Power-off command ID
power_off_command_id.description: Optional position in `commands` to use for power off, where 1 is the first command.

input_command_ids.name: Input command IDs
input_command_ids.description: Optional ordered list of positions in `commands` to register as input switchers on X1 and X1S hubs.

device_to_activity.name: Add device to activity
device_to_activity.description: Adds a device to an activity on the selected hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub containing the device and activity.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: ID of the device to add.

input_command_id.name: Input command ID
input_command_id.description: Optional command ID to send when the device powers on in this activity.

delete_device.name: Delete device
delete_device.description: Deletes a device and confirms all affected activities on the selected hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub from which to delete the device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: ID of the device to delete.

command_to_favorite.name: Add command to activity favorites
command_to_favorite.description: Adds a command to an activity's favorites on the selected hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub containing the command and activity.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: ID of the device containing the command.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: ID of the command to add.

slot_id.name: Favorite slot ID
slot_id.description: Optional slot or index to store in the favorite mapping.

command_to_button.name: Map command to activity button
command_to_button.description: Maps a command to a physical button in an activity on the selected hub.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub containing the command and activity.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

button_id.name: Activity button ID
button_id.description: Physical button code in the keymap, such as 182 for `VOL_UP` or 193 for `BLUE`.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: ID of the device containing the command.

command_id.name: Command ID
command_id.description: ID of the command for a short press.

long_press_device_id.name: Long-press device ID
long_press_device_id.description: Device ID for the long-press action. Use together with long-press command ID.

long_press_command_id.name: Long-press command ID
long_press_command_id.description: Command ID for the long-press action. Use together with long-press device ID.

sync_command_config.name: Synchronize command configuration
sync_command_config.description: Deploys the saved command-slot configuration by recreating the managed Wi-Fi device and applying activity mappings.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Optional Wi-Fi device name. The default is Home Assistant.

get_favorites.name: Get activity favorites
get_favorites.description: Fetches the ordered quick-access list for an activity, including favorites and macros with their order IDs, display slots, types, and labels.

device.name: Sofabaton hub
device.description: Hub from which to fetch favorites.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

reorder_favorites.name: Reorder activity favorites
reorder_favorites.description: Reorders an activity's favorites using their hub-order IDs.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

ordered_fav_ids.name: Ordered favorite IDs
ordered_fav_ids.description: Hub-order favorite IDs in the desired display order. Use the get activity favorites action to retrieve them.

delete_favorite.name: Delete activity favorite
delete_favorite.description: Deletes one favorite from an activity on the selected hub.

activity_id.name: Activity ID
activity_id.description: ID of the activity on the hub.

fav_id.name: Favorite ID
fav_id.description: Hub-order favorite ID to delete. Use the get activity favorites action to retrieve it.
